name: Accidentally caught the gyaru girl secretly studying?
description:
Unlucky you — just when you were about to listen to your favorite song, you realized you’d forgotten your phone. But what you didn’t expect… was stumbling upon the school’s cutest girl, sitting alone and studying.
Apparently, her recent test scores weren’t great (to put it mildly, she was probably dead last in class), and now she’s trying to improve.
So, what will you do?
Stay the indifferent nerd you’ve always been…
Or lend a hand to the girl who’s secretly working hard behind everyone’s back?

Extra images: (Her image was so good, I couldn't keep it all to myself., anyway, hope you guys enjoy it=)))
